mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Sunday: Will Connelly Early rebound in the Bronx?
mlb.summary: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Sunday's MLB action.

mlb.headline: Bryce Miller and Dominic Canzone lead the Mariners to a 4-0 win over the Tigers
mlb.summary: — Bryce Miller allowed one hit in six scoreless innings and the Seattle Mariners got back on track with a 4-0 win over the Detroit Tigers on Saturday afternoon.

mlb.headline: Reds hoping ace Hunter Greene can return before All-Star break
mlb.summary: The Reds have moved up their timetable for right-hander Hunter Greene's return, with the team hopeful their ace can be back before the All-Star break in July.

mlb.headline: Rays moving Steven Matz from rotation to bullpen
mlb.summary: The Rays are moving left-hander Steven Matz from the rotation to the bullpen after two poor starts in which his ERA has climbed to 5.48 this season.

mlb.headline: Cubs hold slumping shortstop Dansby Swanson out of lineup
mlb.summary: Two-time Gold Glove shortstop Dansby Swanson was held out of the Cubs' starting lineup against the Giants because of his ongoing struggles at the plate.

mlb.headline: Twins recall former top prospect Royce Lewis from Triple-A
mlb.summary: The Twins have recalled infielder Royce Lewis from Triple-A St. Paul, less than three weeks after he was sent down to work on his swing mechanics and position flexibility.

nhl.headline: Former Sabres general manager Gerry Meehan dies at 79
nhl.summary: Gerry Meehan, one of the Buffalo Sabres' first players who went on to an influential role as the franchise's general manager, died on Friday at the age of 79, the club announced.

nhl.headline: Vegas mum on McNabb's status for Game 3 of Stanley Cup Final
nhl.summary: The status of Brayden McNabb for Game 3 of the Stanley Cup Final remains unclear after the Vegas defenseman left Game 2 against Carolina after taking a puck to the face.

nhl.headline: Lightning's Andrei Vasilevskiy wins second Vezina Trophy
nhl.summary: The Lightning's Andrei Vasilevskiy has won the Vezina Trophy, the second time he has been named the NHL's top goaltender.

nhl.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
nhl.summary: The setting has shifted to Vegas for Games 3 and 4 with the series tied 1-1.

nhl.headline: NHL Stanley Pup 2026: How to watch, schedule, more
nhl.summary: The third annual Stanley Pup premieres Monday at 8 p.m. ET in Canada and 9:30 p.m. ET in the United States.

nhl.headline: NHL exec Cliff Fletcher, who built Flames into winner, dies at 90
nhl.summary: NHL executive Cliff Fletcher, who led the Flames to a Stanley Cup championship in 1989 and helped turn Toronto into a contender while earning the nickname "Trader Cliff" for his skillful wheeling and dealing, has died at 90.

nba.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks are big title favorites after taking 2-0 lead on Spurs
nba.summary: The Knicks' incredible playoff run continues, as they are up 2-0 on the Spurs and head to New York as big championship favorites.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Important plays, lessons from Knicks-Spurs Game 2
nba.summary: Is it time to panic for San Antonio? Let's break down Knicks-Spurs Game 2 from all angles, then look ahead to a massive Game 3 in New York.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Biggest takeaways from Knicks-Spurs Game 2
nba.summary: NBA insiders break down the biggest takeaways from Game 2 of the NBA Finals and look ahead to the rest of the Knicks-Spurs showdown.

nba.headline: Salesian Sisters are divine force behind Spurs' NBA Finals hopes
nba.summary: A group of Catholic sisters have gone viral for their decades-long dedication to their hometown team. If their prayers are answered, the Wemby Era will begin with a Spurs win.

nba.headline: Wemby rues costly turnover as Spurs fall in Game 2 of NBA Finals
nba.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama admitted urgency got the better of him when he committed a late turnover in Friday's Game 2 loss, but he said he would use the frustration as fuel for the next game.

nba.headline: Mike Brown suggests country music helped Mitchell Robinson guard Wemby
nba.summary: Mike Brown suggests country music helped Mitchell Robinson guard Wemby

wnba.headline: Howard scores 27, Miles adds 19, Lynx beat Storm 88-68 for seventh straight win
wnba.summary: — Natasha Howard had a season-high 27 points on 12-of-16 shooting, Olivia Miles added 19 points, six assists and six rebounds, and the Minnesota Lynx beat the Seattle Storm 88-68 on Saturday for their seventh win in a row — the last six by double...

wnba.summary: Portland Fire (6-6, 0-2 Western Conference) at Los Angeles Sparks (4-6, 2/3 Western Conference)

wnba.headline: Plum returns, but Wings beat Sparks behind Bueckers, Ogunbowale
wnba.summary: Kelsey Plum scored 27 points in her return from a three-game injury absence, but it wasn't enough as the Wings beat the Sparks behind a career-high 14 assists from Paige Bueckers and season-high 30 points from Arike Ogunbowale.

wnba.headline: Bonner helps the short-handed Mercury beat the Fire 78-72
wnba.summary: — DeWanna Bonner scored a season-high 19 points, Natasha Mack added 16 points and the short-handed Phoenix Mercury beat the Portland Fire 78-72 on Friday night.

wnba.headline: Arike Ogunbowale's 30 points, Paige Bueckers' career-high 14 assists lead Wings past Sparks 104-96
wnba.summary: — Arike Ogunbowale scored 30 points and made six 3-pointers, Paige Bueckers had 18 points and a career-high 14 assists and the Dallas Wings beat the Los Angeles Sparks 104-96 on Friday night for their fourth straight victory.

wnba.headline: Skylar Diggins scores 24 and the Sky beat the Sun 85-80 to end a 5-game losing streak.
wnba.summary: — Skylar Diggins scored 18 of her 24 points in the first half, Elizabeth Williams made two key baskets in the final minute, and the Chicago Sky beat the Connecticut Sun 85-80 on Friday night to end a five-game losing streak.

ncaab.headline: Which SEC stars need to shine to advance in the Super Regionals
ncaab.summary: SEC Network analyst Jared Mitchell chooses his most important player for each of the SEC's Super Regional matchups and explains why they need to be at their best to move on.

ncaab.headline: Super Saturday: Previewing all seven SEC squads Super Regional matchups
ncaab.summary: SEC Now's Jared Mitchell breaks down every SEC team's keys for victory as they aim to keep their seasons rolling as the NCAA Super Regionals begin.

ncaab.headline: Ole Miss uses long ball to knock off Auburn in opener
ncaab.summary: Judd Utermark and Collin Reuter each hit a two-run homer to spark Ole Miss to 6-4 victory over host Auburn on Friday at Plainsman Park in the opening game of an NCAA super regional.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: Zverev vs. Cobolli: Who will win the French Open title?
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev and Flavio Cobolli will play each other in an unexpected French Open final. Is this Zverev's to win? We take a look.

tennis.headline: Zverev happy to be back on Grand Slam final stage
tennis.summary: Zverev happy to be back on Grand Slam final stage

tennis.headline: Italians Cobolli, Arnaldi advance to French Open semifinals
tennis.summary: Tenth-seeded Flavio Cobolli beat No. 4 Felix Auger-Aliassime in the men's quarterfinals of the French Open on Wednesday and will face fellow Italian Matteo Arnaldi for a spot in the final.

tennis.headline: Mensik halts Fonseca, gets Zverev next in French Open semifinals
tennis.summary: Jakub Mensik rolled to a straight-sets win over Brazilian teen Joao Fonseca to advance to the French Open semifinals, where he'll face No. 2 seed Alexander Zverev.

tennis.headline: After his French Open loss, what's next for Frances Tiafoe?
tennis.summary: Frances Tiafoe was the last American standing at the French Open -- exceeding all expectations. And it bodes well for the rest of his season.

f1.headline: Monaco GP: Mercedes' George Russell 'bamboozled,' struggles for 'answers'
f1.summary: After struggling to sixth on the grid in Monaco, George Russell admitted he is " bit bamboozled" by how his season has unravelled so quickly.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton on chances of first Ferrari win in Monaco: 'Nothing's impossible'
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton insisted he is ready to complete the "impossible" dream and fight his way to a maiden Ferrari victory in Sunday's prestigious Monaco Grand Prix.

f1.headline: Leclerc & Russell discuss Monaco qualifying struggles
f1.summary: Ferrari's Charles Leclerc and Mercedes' George Russell reflect on disappointing performances in Monaco qualifying.

f1.headline: Antonelli, Vertstappen & Hamilton react to 'intense' Monaco qualifying
f1.summary: Hear from the top three for Sunday's starting grid in Monaco, as Kimi Antonelli takes pole ahead of Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton.

f1.headline: Monaco GP: Ferrari's Charles Leclerc puts pole lap error down to 'dirty air'
f1.summary: Charles Leclerc put his critical error in qualifying for the Monaco Grand Prix down to "dirty air" after he crashed on his final attempt to secure pole position.

f1.headline: Monaco GP: Kimi Antonelli eyes fifth straight win after 'magic' pole
f1.summary: Kimi Antonelli produced what he described as a "magic lap" to secure a sensational Monaco Grand Prix pole position on Saturday.

football.headline: Ward 'definitely' wants to stay with Browns after Garrett trade
football.summary: Browns cornerback Denzel Ward says he wants to remain in Cleveland, even after the team traded defensive end Myles Garrett to the Rams.

football.headline: Lacking a star, Cowboys lean on depth for their pass rush
football.summary: With the likes of Myles Garrett out of the picture, Dallas will lean on Rashan Gary and Malachi Lawrence in 2026.

football.headline: Nico Collins' raise puts Texans' WR in line with booming market
football.summary: Shortly after Collins signed an extension in 2024, the NFL quickly began to rewrite the WR market.

football.headline: Chiefs banking on Xavier Worthy, young WR group to improve
football.summary: Chiefs coach Andy Reid's biggest assistant hire this offseason might be his new receivers coach, Chad O'Shea.

football.headline: How Ravens OC Declan Doyle can reboot Baltimore offense
football.summary: Doyle, 30, is taking over a Baltimore offense that dropped to No. 16 in total yards after years of success.

football.headline: Is there any chance the Bears don't move to Indiana?
